Section Title: Sara Blakely > Explore more posts
Content:
At the Spring 2026 Atlanta Jewelry Show, we are hosting a dedicated session: "Mentoring the Next Generation: Creating an Apprenticeship That Works." This session provides a roadmap for retailers and shop managers to implement the MJSA Mentorship and Apprenticeship Program. We will discuss how to move away from informal "on-the-job training" toward a Department of Labor-approved framework that ensures consistency and measurable skill growth.
